documents.title: Tokenization - Mistral AI Cookbook
documents.description: Learn Tokenization with practical examples and code snippets using Mistral AI's LLMs.

documents.title: Tokenization - Mistral AI Cookbook
documents.description: Learn Tokenization with practical examples and code snippets using Mistral AI's LLMs.
documents.summary: This document explains the concept of control tokens, detailing how they address efficiency, security, and boundary issues in language model tokenization compared to standard string markers.

documents.title: Tokenization - Mistral AI Cookbook
documents.description: Learn Tokenization with practical examples and code snippets using Mistral AI's LLMs.
documents.summary: This document explains the boundary problem in LLM tokenization and how it causes model bias during text generation. It discusses solutions such as structured template encoding and the token healing technique to improve output accuracy.

documents.title: Tokenization - Mistral AI Cookbook
documents.description: Learn Tokenization with practical examples and code snippets using Mistral AI's LLMs.
documents.summary: This document explains the mechanism of tool calling in large language models and details how different tokenizer versions use control tokens to manage tool interactions and results.

documents.title: Tokenizer - Mistral AI Cookbook
documents.description: Learn Tokenizer with practical examples and code snippets using Mistral AI's LLMs.
documents.summary: This document explains the fundamental role of tokenizers in language models, covering the processes of encoding and decoding, different tokenization methods, and the trade-offs involved in vocabulary size and efficiency.

documents.title: Demystifying Mistral's Instruct Tokenization & Chat Templates - Mistral AI Cookbook
documents.description: Learn Demystifying Mistral's Instruct Tokenization & Chat Templates with practical examples and code snippets using Mistral AI's LLMs.
documents.summary: This document explains the technical evolution and implementation details of Mistral AI's tokenizer versions, from V1 to Tekken, focusing on instruction following and chat templates.
